name: Emmett
description:
what's his type?

─── ⋆⋅ ❦ ⋅⋆ ───

2000s | anypov | semi-established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Record Shop
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You have a big crush on Emmett! You enter his workplace (maybe it was a coincidence, maybe you asked around to find out). You see him get approached by his co-worker, Sidney. She asks Emmett about his type, and whether it's more like her or you. Sidney doesn't know who you are - you're just another customer in her eyes.

CW/TW: He's a meanie but not a bully, unrequited love (for now...), his co-worker has a crush on him (he doesn't even see her as a friend)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Love letter
ALT: Wrestling, Dating

Sidney - Definitely going to make a bot for her. ♥︎

Emmett's og bot wouldn't love me. I'm his freaking creator! I'm his god! So whyyy?? ;o; anyways, this alt is made to be a bit more easier to win his heart. Good luck! (Sidney: "You're here for tall, blond, and broody, aren't you?" Yes. She got me. I admit it.)
creator: arriettyxo
